name: Satkar Grewal
Information: I'm a results-driven entrepreneur with a passion for building scalable businesses. With a strong foundation in operations and a deep understanding of market dynamics, I founded Logipod to create seamless logistics solutions that empower businesses to thrive. My focus is on leveraging technology and innovation to simplify complex supply chain challenges and deliver measurable value to our clients.

name: ANKIT SRIVASTAVA
Information: I am an Lead-Central Supply with 16 years of experience in supply chain management, warehousing, transport operations, and e-commerce logistics.has built and managed FTL, D2D and PTL service models across India, with strong expertise in vendor management, stakeholder coordination, pricing, and process excellence. has led first-mile to last-mile operations, managed regional logistics teams, and driven growth through business development and operational improvements.

name: Ravi Kumar
Information: Operations & Logistics Professional with 23+ years of experience in logistics operations, billing, vendor management, data analysis, and process optimization across manufacturing, telecom, and logistics industries. Currently working with Logipod Logistics Pvt Ltd, managing operational workflows, freight processes, reporting, and cross-functional coordination to improve efficiency and service delivery. Strong expertise in MIS reporting, Oracle systems, Excel, SQL, team management, and process improvement initiatives. Recognized for analytical thinking, problem-solving abilities, and driving operational excellence through continuous improvement and technology-driven solutions.

name: Ashutosh Vishwakarma
Information: Having 9+ years of experience in Sales & Business Development, currently working with 'LOGIPOD Logistics Pvt Ltd' Here, I am getting great exposure and learning opportunities while leading the complete FTL sales domain. Passionate about building strong client relationships and driving business growth through efficient logistics solutions.

name: Devashish Tiwari
Information: With close to 10 years of experience in Core HR across organizations like BlackBuck, Zetwerk, and Furlenco, my journey has been centered around building strong teams, scalable HR processes, and high-performance work cultures in fast-growing environments. At Logipod, I got the opportunity to build and lead the entire HR function from scratch. Over the last one year, I have been driving end-to-end HR operations — from strategic hiring and team building to creating policies, improving employee engagement, and strengthening organizational culture. What makes this journey truly rewarding is the trust, ownership, and opportunity to create real business impact. Being part of Logipod’s growth story and helping shape its people culture has been one of the most fulfilling experiences of my professional career.
